title: hygrochilus parishii
intro: Hygrochilus parishii, also known as the Indian gentian or gentian root, is a plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hygrochilus parishii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations have also been used in the form of capsules or powdered extracts for its medicinal properties.
